title: Constrained type arithmetic result type unspecified
description: The spec defines constrained types (e.g. type Percent = u8 where value <= 100) and how to convert into them, but says nothing about arithmetic on them. The result type of Percent + Percent is unspecified: is it u8, Percent, or something else? If u8, callers must manually re-check constraints, adding boilerplate. If Percent, the compiler must prove the sum satisfies the constraint (often impossible statically). Callers who add two Percent values expecting a Percent will be surprised either by a type error or by a runtime failure. The spec must define arithmetic semantics for constrained types, including whether operations produce constrained or unconstrained results.
